seo.description: Download the Able Assess Quick Start Guide and full User Guide, peer-reviewed clinical summaries and the Able Assess mobile apps for iOS and Android.

blocks.headline: Downloads.
blocks.subtitle: The Able Assess Quick Start and User Guide, peer-reviewed clinical summaries and the mobile apps for iOS and Android. Everything you need to get started with Able Care, in one place.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Older adult reading the Able Care brochure

blocks.heading: Able Assess guides
blocks.body:
Able Assess Quick Start Guide (v1.10.1)

A short overview for first-time users. Covers sensor pairing, the five-minute screening workflow and running your first assessment. Designed to get any team member up and running in under ten minutes.

Open the Quick Start Guide

Able Assess User Guide (v1.10.1)

The complete operator manual. Walks through every screen and feature in the Able Assess app: sensor setup, the four-metric workflow, interpreting results and sharing data with care teams. Written for any member of staff running assessments at the bedside, in the clinic or in a resident's living room.

Open the User Guide

Grip Strength: The Essential Biomarker for Longevity

A peer-reviewed clinical summary linking grip strength to biological age, mortality, frailty and chronic disease risk, with guidance on integrating grip testing into routine assessment. Useful for clinicians, researchers and wellness teams.

Open the PDF

blocks.heading: Mobile apps
blocks.body:
The Able Assess app runs the full four-metric screening workflow on any iOS or Android tablet. The GripAble sensor pairs via Bluetooth. No specialist hardware required.

Able Assess on iOS

Available on the Apple App Store for iPad and iPhone.

Download on the App Store

Able Assess on Android

Available on Google Play for Android phones and tablets.

Get it on Google Play

Able Rehab (GripAble)

Looking for the rehab platform? Able Rehab is our stroke and neuro recovery companion, powered by the same GripAble sensor. Explore the full platform on the GripAble site.

Visit gripable.co

blocks.heading: Need something we haven't listed?
blocks.bodyText: The team can share protocol templates, ROI models, integration specs and anything else you need to evaluate Able Assess for your setting.
